input_text: Korang pergi report akaun dia sampai kena ban. Biar dia tahu rasa. Share nama penuh dia — Amirah binti Kamal, kerja kat KLCC tu.
reason: Coordinates online mob action against a named individual, exposing her workplace and full name to facilitate harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang melakukan kesalahan dalam talian, gunakan fungsi laporan platform. Jangan dedahkan maklumat peribadi orang lain.

input_text: Typical la bangsa ni, mesti curi. Tengok semua kes ragut kat berita, check la muka siapa. Memang DNA diorang.
reason: Stereotypes an entire ethnic group as inherently criminal by linking them to snatch theft cases, using dehumanizing 'DNA' framing.
suggested_rewrite: Jenayah ragut adalah isu keselamatan awam yang perlu ditangani melalui penguatkuasaan undang-undang, bukan dikaitkan dengan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Kedai makan bangsa tu aku dengar letak benda haram dalam makanan supaya orang kita jadi ketagih. Boikot semua!
reason: Spreads a baseless rumor about food contamination at ethnic restaurants to incite communal boycotts without any evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada syak makanan tercemar, buat aduan rasmi kepada KKM atau pihak berkuasa tempatan. Jangan sebarkan tuduhan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Aku dah dapat alamat rumah mamat yang viral tu. Sape nak pergi 'lawat' dia, PM aku. Kena ajar sikit budak ni.
reason: Shares intent to distribute a person's home address and organize a physical confrontation, combining doxxing with vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang melakukan kesalahan, buat laporan polis. Jangan ambil tindakan sendiri atau dedahkan alamat orang lain.

input_text: Agama dia tu memang tak logic. Sembah berhala, makan benda pelik-pelik. Patut la negara diorang mundur.
reason: Mocks another religion's practices as illogical idol worship and links it to national backwardness, constituting religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap agama mempunyai amalan yang bermakna bagi penganutnya. Kita perlu menghormati kepelbagaian agama di Malaysia.

input_text: Taman ni taman kita. Kalau diorang nak buat upacara agama, pergi la tempat lain. Bising sangat lagi tu.
reason: Attempts communal gatekeeping of public space by demanding a religious group conduct their ceremonies elsewhere, framed as exclusionary.
suggested_rewrite: Penggunaan taman awam perlu diurus secara adil untuk semua komuniti. Sebarang aduan bunyi bising boleh disalurkan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan.

input_text: Balik la negara asal kau. Kau bukan rakyat sini pun. IC Malaysia beli je tu.
reason: Directs 'go back to your country' hostility at someone while questioning the legitimacy of their citizenship, constituting xenophobic abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Semua pemegang warganegara Malaysia mempunyai hak yang sama di sisi undang-undang. Jangan persoalkan status warganegara seseorang tanpa asas.

input_text: Cancel budak ni. Dia pernah cakap benda rasis 5 tahun lepas. Aku ada screenshot. Biar hilang kerja dia.
reason: Organizes cancel culture campaign against an individual using old screenshots with the explicit goal of causing job loss, constituting targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang pernah membuat kenyataan rasis, bincangkan isu tersebut secara konstruktif. Menghancurkan kerjaya seseorang bukan penyelesaian.

input_text: Restoran India kat area tu kotor gila. Dengar cerita ada tikus dalam sup. Jangan pergi makan sana, bahaya nyawa.
reason: Spreads unverified food safety rumors targeting ethnic Indian restaurants specifically, combining misinformation with communal bias.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda mempunyai aduan kebersihan tentang mana-mana restoran, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa kesihatan tempatan dengan bukti yang jelas.

input_text: Aku tahu tempat kerja minah tu. Nanti aku pergi complain kat bos dia. Biar dia kena buang kerja. Padan muka.
reason: Threatens to weaponize someone's workplace information to get them fired as personal revenge, exposing workplace details.
suggested_rewrite: Jika ada pertikaian peribadi, selesaikan secara matang atau melalui saluran yang sesuai. Jangan cuba merosakkan pekerjaan seseorang sebagai balas dendam.

input_text: Cina memang suka tipu dalam bisnes. Sebab tu la semua kedai tutup awal takut kena rompak. DNA penipu.
reason: Applies ethnic stereotype labeling Chinese Malaysians as inherently dishonest in business, using dehumanizing DNA framing.
suggested_rewrite: Penipuan dalam perniagaan berlaku merentasi semua kaum. Isu ini perlu ditangani melalui penguatkuasaan undang-undang perdagangan.

input_text: Masjid nak buat azan kuat sangat, tapi kuil pun sama je bunyi loceng bising. Dua-dua pun annoying, tapi at least Islam agama rasmi.
reason: Dismisses both religious practices as annoying while asserting religious supremacy, provoking interfaith tension.
suggested_rewrite: Isu bunyi dari rumah ibadat boleh diselesaikan melalui dialog antara komuniti dan peraturan pihak berkuasa tempatan secara adil.

input_text: Pergi la report page dia. Aku nak tengok muka dia masa kena fired. Tag bos dia sekali. Nama company dia ABC Sdn Bhd.
reason: Coordinates harassment campaign including tagging employer and naming the company to sabotage someone's livelihood.
suggested_rewrite: Jika seseorang melanggar undang-undang atau peraturan, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa. Jangan cuba merosakkan kehidupan seseorang secara terbuka.

input_text: Dah la duduk sini free, kerja pun tak bayar cukai. Kalau tak suka, balik la tanah besar.
reason: Directs 'go back' rhetoric at a community while making false accusations about tax evasion, combining xenophobia with misinformation.
suggested_rewrite: Isu percukaian dan status penduduk perlu ditangani melalui dasar kerajaan yang telus, bukan dengan sentimen perkauman.

input_text: Mak bapak dia pun macam tu jugak. Memang keturunan penipu. Tak hairan la anak-anak pun sama.
reason: Attacks an individual's entire family lineage as inherently dishonest, combining personal abuse with ethnic stereotyping.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan menilai seseorang atau keluarga mereka berdasarkan stereotaip. Setiap individu perlu dinilai atas tindakan mereka sendiri.

input_text: Gereja diorang buat event kat dewan komuniti kita. Siapa bagi kebenaran? Ini kawasan majoriti Islam, jangan kurang ajar.
reason: Attempts religious gatekeeping of a community hall based on majority religion status, framing Christian events as disrespectful.
suggested_rewrite: Dewan komuniti adalah untuk semua penduduk. Pengurusan tempahan perlu dibuat secara adil melalui pihak berkuasa tempatan.

input_text: Warung Mamak tu aku dengar guna minyak terpakai berkali-kali. Orang India memang macam tu, jimat sampai bahayakan kesihatan orang.
reason: Spreads food safety rumors about Mamak restaurants and generalizes the practice to the entire Indian community.
suggested_rewrite: Kebimbangan tentang kebersihan makanan perlu dilaporkan kepada pihak berkuasa kesihatan. Jangan kaitkan isu ini dengan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Thread ni khas untuk expose perangai sebenar si Hafiz tu. Drop semua info korang tahu — tempat tinggal, kereta, semua.
reason: Creates a dedicated thread to doxx a named individual by soliciting personal details including residence and vehicle information.
suggested_rewrite: Menyebarkan maklumat peribadi seseorang secara terbuka adalah salah di sisi undang-undang. Jika ada aduan, gunakan saluran rasmi.

input_text: Orang Melayu memang pemalas, asyik harap subsidi je. Sebab tu la ekonomi tak maju. Kaum lain yang buat kerja semua.
reason: Stereotypes Malays as lazy and subsidy-dependent while crediting other races for economic work, provoking interethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu kebergantungan kepada subsidi perlu ditangani melalui dasar ekonomi yang lebih inklusif tanpa menyalahkan mana-mana kaum.

input_text: Diorang buat kenduri kahwin kat padang taman. Bau kari merata-rata. Padang tu untuk semua orang, bukan untuk masak lembu.
reason: Demeans a community's cultural celebration in public space with dismissive remarks about their food, constituting communal gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: Penggunaan ruang awam untuk majlis perlu mendapat kelulusan pihak berkuasa tempatan. Semua komuniti berhak menggunakan kemudahan awam.

input_text: Si Siti tu kerja kat bank CIMB Damansara. Kalau nak complain pasal dia, pergi branch tu terus. Bagi dia malu depan bos.
reason: Exposes a named person's specific workplace branch to facilitate public humiliation, combining privacy exposure with targeted harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan tentang perkhidmatan bank boleh dibuat melalui saluran rasmi. Jangan dedahkan maklumat tempat kerja seseorang untuk tujuan mempermalukan mereka.

input_text: Aku dah tak tahan. Kaum ni memang tak reti bersyukur duduk kat Malaysia. Nak hak sama tapi tak nak contribute.
reason: Frames a minority group as ungrateful and non-contributing, questioning their right to equal treatment in their own country.
suggested_rewrite: Semua warganegara Malaysia mempunyai hak dan tanggungjawab yang sama. Perbincangan tentang hak perlu dilakukan secara inklusif.

input_text: Budak viral tu dari sekolah SMK Taman Melati. Aku kenal family dia. Korang serbu la akaun social media dia.
reason: Identifies a viral individual's school and encourages mass harassment of their social media accounts, constituting targeted mob abuse.
suggested_rewrite: Jangan sebar maklumat peribadi orang lain atau ajak orang ramai untuk menyerang akaun media sosial mereka. Biarkan pihak sekolah menguruskan isu ini.

input_text: Kalau bukan sebab dasar kerajaan yang bagi semua kat satu kaum je, negara kita dah maju macam Singapura.
reason: Blames affirmative action policies for national stagnation in a way that targets a specific ethnic group, stoking communal resentment.
suggested_rewrite: Dasar ekonomi negara boleh dinilai secara objektif untuk memastikan ia memberi manfaat kepada semua rakyat Malaysia.

input_text: Masa perayaan diorang, satu kampung kena dengar muzik kuat sampai pukul 3 pagi. Tak hormat orang lain langsung. Patut la orang tak suka diorang.
reason: Uses noise complaints during a cultural festival to justify broader communal dislike of an entire group.
suggested_rewrite: Aduan bunyi bising semasa perayaan boleh disalurkan kepada pihak berkuasa tempatan. Kita perlu hormati hak semua pihak.

input_text: Orang Sabah Sarawak datang KL ingat diorang hebat. Balik la hutan korang. KL bukan tempat orang kampung.
reason: Directs 'go back' hostility at East Malaysians in KL, demeaning them as jungle dwellers and excluding them from urban spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Semua rakyat Malaysia berhak tinggal dan bekerja di mana-mana bahagian negara. Jangan hina asal usul seseorang.

input_text: Mamak stall tu guna ayam expired. Confirm punya. Semua kedai diorang sama je, jimat sampai jual makanan basi.
reason: Spreads unverified expired food claims targeting Mamak restaurants as a group, linking food safety issues to ethnic identity.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda syak makanan tidak segar, laporkan kepada pihak berkuasa kesihatan. Jangan buat tuduhan umum terhadap semua kedai berdasarkan kaum.

input_text: Korang kenal tak mamat ni? Dia scam kawan aku RM5000. Nama dia Tan Wei Liang, kerja kat Sunway Pyramid. Share sampai viral.
reason: Exposes a named individual's full name and workplace based on unverified scam allegations, encouraging viral spread for public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Jika anda ditipu, buat laporan polis dengan bukti yang lengkap. Jangan sebarkan nama dan tempat kerja seseorang tanpa pengesahan pihak berkuasa.

input_text: Doa diorang tu macam jampi serapah je. Bunyik pelik-pelik, tak faham pun. Macam mana nak kata tu agama betul?
reason: Demeans another religion's prayers as incantations and questions its legitimacy, constituting religious mockery.
suggested_rewrite: Setiap agama mempunyai cara ibadah yang unik. Walaupun kita tidak memahami bahasa atau cara doa agama lain, kita perlu menghormatinya.

input_text: Kedai makan tu punya owner baru je kena tangkap sebab dadah. Confirm la makanan dia pun ada campur benda pelik. All their shops macam tu la.
reason: Links a food outlet owner's drug arrest to baseless claims about food contamination and extends the accusation to all their shops without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: Jika pemilik restoran ditangkap, biarkan pihak berkuasa menyiasat. Jangan buat andaian tentang kualiti makanan tanpa bukti.

input_text: Tok guru cakap tak boleh berkawan rapat dengan non-Muslim. Nanti iman kita tergugat. Mereka bukan macam kita.
reason: Uses religious authority to discourage interfaith friendship, framing non-Muslims as a threat to faith and promoting social segregation.
suggested_rewrite: Islam menggalakkan hubungan baik dengan semua manusia. Persahabatan antara pelbagai agama memperkukuh perpaduan masyarakat.

input_text: Dia cakap dia Malaysian tapi accent macam foreigner. Confirm beli IC. Patut report kat immigration. Share post ni sampai viral.
reason: Questions someone's citizenship based on their accent and accuses them of buying identity documents, constituting discriminatory harassment.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia mempunyai pelbagai loghat dan aksen. Jangan persoalkan kewarganegaraan seseorang berdasarkan cara mereka bercakap.

input_text: Tak payah layan orang macam dia. Bangsa dia memang perangai macam tu — cakap manis depan, tikam belakang. Fitrah diorang.
reason: Attributes backstabbing behavior to an entire ethnic group as their inherent nature, promoting communal distrust.
suggested_rewrite: Perangai seseorang tidak mewakili kaum mereka. Jangan menilai seluruh bangsa berdasarkan tindakan individu.

input_text: Semua Chinese company kat Malaysia ni racist. They only hire their own kind. Cuba la apply kerja kat company Cina, confirm tak dapat.
reason: Makes sweeping accusations of racism against all Chinese-owned companies, promoting interethnic resentment in employment.
suggested_rewrite: Isu diskriminasi pekerjaan perlu ditangani melalui aduan rasmi kepada Jabatan Tenaga Kerja. Jangan buat tuduhan umum terhadap semua syarikat berdasarkan kaum pemilik.

input_text: Jiran sebelah rumah aku tu convert masuk Kristian. Dulu Islam. Aku dah bagitahu satu kampung. Biar semua orang tahu muka murtad tu.
reason: Publicly outs a neighbor's religious conversion to incite communal shaming, violating religious privacy and potentially endangering them.
suggested_rewrite: Hal ehwal agama seseorang adalah urusan peribadi. Sebarang kebimbangan tentang penukaran agama perlu dirujuk kepada pihak berkuasa agama, bukan disebarkan untuk mempermalukan.

input_text: This girl at my office said something I didn't like, so I'm sharing her LinkedIn and phone number. Let's make sure she never works in this industry again.
reason: Threatens to share a colleague's personal contact details and professional profile to orchestrate career destruction as retaliation.
suggested_rewrite: If you have a workplace disagreement, address it through proper HR channels. Sharing someone's personal information to harm their career is unethical and potentially illegal.

input_text: Every time there's a robbery in the news, just look at the suspect's race. It's always the same group. Crime is in their blood.
reason: Racially profiles an entire ethnic group as inherently criminal based on selective crime reporting, using dehumanizing biological framing.
suggested_rewrite: Crime is a socioeconomic issue that affects all communities. Racial profiling based on news reports is misleading and harmful to community cohesion.

input_text: I heard the Malay restaurant near my house uses expired ingredients and never washes their hands. Don't eat there unless you want food poisoning.
reason: Spreads unverified food safety allegations specifically targeting an ethnic restaurant, combining misinformation with racial bias.
suggested_rewrite: If you have food safety concerns about any restaurant, report them to the local health authority with evidence rather than spreading unverified claims online.

input_text: Found out where that Twitter troll works — he's at Petronas Twin Towers, floor 22. Someone should pay him a visit and teach him some manners.
reason: Exposes a person's specific workplace location down to the floor number and encourages physical confrontation, combining doxxing with vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: If someone is harassing you online, report them to the platform and authorities. Never share someone's workplace details or encourage physical confrontation.

input_text: Hinduism is basically just worshipping statues and animals. At least Islam and Christianity worship a real God. How can educated people believe in that?
reason: Dismisses Hinduism as illogical idol worship while elevating other religions, constituting religious provocation and disrespect.
suggested_rewrite: Every religion has deep theological traditions. It's important to understand other faiths respectfully rather than making dismissive comparisons.

input_text: The park near Section 17 should only be used by the Malay community. Other races have their own areas. Stop invading our spaces.
reason: Attempts ethnic gatekeeping of a public park, demanding racial segregation of community spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Public parks belong to all citizens. Community spaces should be shared inclusively regardless of ethnicity.

input_text: If you can't speak Bahasa Malaysia properly, you don't belong here. Go back to China or India. This is our country, not yours.
reason: Directs 'go back to your country' rhetoric at fellow Malaysian citizens based on language ability, constituting xenophobic exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: Malaysia is a multilingual nation. While learning Bahasa Malaysia is encouraged, all citizens belong here regardless of their language proficiency.

input_text: Let's all mass report this woman's Instagram until it gets taken down. She doesn't deserve a platform after what she said. Her name is Priya Kumari, works at Maybank HQ.
reason: Organizes a mass reporting campaign against a named individual while exposing her employer, constituting coordinated harassment with privacy breach.
suggested_rewrite: If someone posts harmful content, use the platform's reporting tools individually. Do not coordinate mass reporting or share someone's personal employment details.

input_text: Those people come from backward countries and bring their backward ways here. Malaysia was fine before they came. Now look at the state of things.
reason: Dehumanizes immigrants as backwards and blames them for national decline, promoting xenophobic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration is a complex policy issue. Constructive discussion should focus on integration policies rather than denigrating people from other countries.

input_text: Chinese restaurants add MSG and weird chemicals to make you addicted. That's how they keep customers coming back. It's basically drugging your food.
reason: Spreads food contamination conspiracy targeting Chinese restaurants specifically, framing MSG use as intentional drugging with ethnic bias.
suggested_rewrite: MSG is a widely used and scientifically studied food additive. Food safety concerns should be directed to health authorities, not used to target specific ethnic cuisines.

input_text: I know this guy's car plate number and where he parks every day. Share this post so everyone knows what a scammer looks like.
reason: Shares vehicle identification and daily parking location to enable tracking and public shaming of an unverified 'scammer'.
suggested_rewrite: If you've been scammed, file a police report with the evidence. Sharing someone's vehicle details and location publicly puts them at risk.

input_text: Islam promotes violence against non-believers. Just read the Quran properly and you'll see. No wonder there are so many problems in Muslim countries.
reason: Makes sweeping claims that Islam promotes violence by selectively interpreting scripture, constituting clear religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: Religious texts contain complex passages that require scholarly context. Making broad claims about any religion based on selective readings is misleading and disrespectful.

input_text: The basketball court in our taman is for residents only. Tell those foreign workers to go play somewhere else. They're making the place unsafe.
reason: Excludes foreign workers from public recreational facilities while baselessly claiming they make the area unsafe.
suggested_rewrite: Community facilities should be managed through proper resident committees. Safety concerns should be reported to authorities, not used to exclude specific groups.

input_text: These immigrants don't pay taxes, don't speak our language, and send all their money overseas. Why should they get any rights here?
reason: Dehumanizes immigrants with multiple false generalizations to argue against their rights, stoking xenophobic sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration policy should be discussed based on facts and data. Many immigrants contribute significantly to the economy and society.

input_text: Can someone find out where this viral Karen lives? She was rude to the makcik at the market. Time to give her a taste of her own medicine.
reason: Solicits a viral individual's home address with explicit intent to retaliate, combining doxxing request with vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: If someone behaves rudely in public, it's best to address it calmly at the moment or report it. Seeking personal information for retaliation is dangerous and wrong.

input_text: The way Christians celebrate Christmas with alcohol and partying just shows their religion has no real moral values. At least we have discipline.
reason: Attacks Christianity by characterizing celebrations as immoral while asserting own religious superiority, provoking interfaith hostility.
suggested_rewrite: Different religions and cultures celebrate in various ways. We should respect these differences rather than making judgmental comparisons.

input_text: That Grab driver was so rude to me. His name is Rajesh, car plate WKN 3345, drives a silver Myvi. Everyone one-star him until he gets deactivated.
reason: Exposes a driver's full name and vehicle details while organizing a coordinated rating attack to destroy his livelihood.
suggested_rewrite: If you had a bad experience with a ride-hailing driver, report it through the app's official complaint system. Don't share personal details publicly.

input_text: Indian neighbourhoods are always dirty and smelly. It's a cultural thing — they just don't care about cleanliness the way we do.
reason: Stereotypes Indian communities as inherently unhygienic, attributing it to their culture, constituting clear ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: Cleanliness issues in any neighbourhood should be addressed through better infrastructure and community programs, not through ethnic stereotyping.

input_text: We need to cancel this influencer. She's half Malay half Chinese and thinks she can talk about race issues. Pick a side or shut up. Share her home address if anyone has it.
reason: Targets a mixed-race individual for cancellation, denies her right to discuss race, and solicits her home address for harassment.
suggested_rewrite: People of mixed heritage have valuable perspectives on race relations. Disagreements should be expressed respectfully without personal attacks or threats.

input_text: Buddhist temples keep expanding into our area. Soon they'll take over the whole neighbourhood. We need to push back before it's too late.
reason: Frames Buddhist temple presence as a territorial threat requiring pushback, provoking religious and communal tension.
suggested_rewrite: Land use and zoning for religious buildings should be managed through proper local authority channels. All communities have a right to places of worship.

input_text: This teacher posted something political on Facebook. She teaches at SK Taman Jaya. Let's all email the school principal and get her transferred or fired.
reason: Identifies a teacher's school to organize a campaign to get her fired over personal political expression, weaponizing workplace information.
suggested_rewrite: Teachers have the right to personal opinions. If you have concerns about a teacher's conduct, address them through proper education department channels.

input_text: Don't trust Malay contractors. They'll take your money and disappear. Every single one I've dealt with is the same. It's a cultural attitude toward work.
reason: Brands all Malay contractors as untrustworthy based on ethnic stereotyping, attributing dishonesty to cultural attitudes.
suggested_rewrite: Bad contractors exist in every community. Always check reviews and references before hiring anyone, regardless of their background.

input_text: I have evidence this politician is secretly funding extremist groups. His name is YB Tan, office kat Petaling Jaya. Everyone share before they delete this.
reason: Spreads unverified extremist funding accusations against a named politician with office location, combining political misinformation with personal targeting.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of extremist funding are extremely serious. If you have evidence, report it to the MACC or police. Spreading unverified claims publicly is irresponsible.

input_text: Everyone in the mamak near my house is illegal. I'm sure of it. They don't even speak BM properly. Time to call immigration and get them all deported.
reason: Profiles all workers at an ethnic restaurant as illegal immigrants based on language ability, calling for mass deportation without evidence.
suggested_rewrite: If you have legitimate immigration concerns, report them to the authorities with specific evidence. Don't make blanket assumptions about people's legal status.

input_text: That viral auntie yang marah cashier tu, I found her Facebook profile. Her son goes to SJKC near Pandan Indah. Let's make her famous for the wrong reasons.
reason: Locates a viral individual's social media and exposes her child's school location, weaponizing family information for public shaming.
suggested_rewrite: Publicly identifying someone's family members and their children's school is extremely harmful. If someone behaved badly, let it go rather than endangering their family.

input_text: 华人餐馆的食物都加了不干净的东西。我朋友吃了之后拉肚子拉了三天。大家别去那些华人档口吃。
reason: Spreads unverified food contamination claims specifically targeting Chinese restaurants, attributing one person's illness to all Chinese food stalls.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您在任何餐馆用餐后感到不适，请向卫生部门投诉并提供证据。不要将个别事件归咎于整个族群的餐馆。

input_text: 马来人就是懒，整天靠政府补贴过日子。难怪经济都被华人掌控了，因为他们根本不努力。
reason: Stereotypes Malays as lazy and subsidy-dependent while framing Chinese economic success as proof of Malay inadequacy, stoking interethnic resentment.
suggested_rewrite: 经济参与度受到许多因素影响。我们应该推动更加公平的经济政策，让所有族群都有平等的发展机会。

input_text: 那个在网上骂人的女生，我查到她在吉隆坡中环广场上班。大家去她公司投诉，让她被炒鱿鱼。
reason: Identifies a person's specific workplace and encourages coordinated complaints to get her fired as online retaliation.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有人在网上发表不当言论，请通过平台举报功能处理。不要曝光他人的工作地点或试图破坏他们的生计。

input_text: 印度教那些节日搞得到处都是颜料和噪音。这是马来西亚，不是印度。他们应该回自己的国家庆祝去。
reason: Attacks Hindu festivals as nuisances and tells Indian Malaysians to go back to India, combining religious intolerance with xenophobic exclusion.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚是多元文化国家，各族群的节日庆典是国家文化遗产的一部分。如有噪音问题，可向地方当局反映。

input_text: 我知道那个骗子住在蕉赖附近，开一辆白色本田。大家看到就拍照发上来，让他无处可藏。
reason: Shares partial location and vehicle details of an alleged scammer and encourages public surveillance, enabling vigilante tracking.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您遇到诈骗，请立即向警方报案并提供相关证据。不要自行追踪或公开他人的个人信息。

input_text: 伊斯兰教就是控制人的宗教，女人都不能自由穿衣服。这种宗教根本不适合现代社会。
reason: Characterizes Islam as oppressive and incompatible with modern society, making provocative generalizations about the religion and its followers.
suggested_rewrite: 每个宗教对着装和行为都有不同的理解。我们应该通过对话来了解不同信仰，而不是做出片面的判断。

input_text: 那些外劳占据了我们的公园，搞得又脏又吵。公园是给马来西亚公民用的，不是给他们的。赶走他们。
reason: Demands exclusion of foreign workers from public parks while stereotyping them as dirty and noisy, promoting xenophobic gatekeeping.
suggested_rewrite: 公园是公共空间，供所有人使用。如果有清洁或噪音问题，请向地方当局反映，不应该针对特定群体。

input_text: 华人商家都是奸商，卖东西价钱贵到离谱。他们就是想榨干每一分钱，这是他们的本性。
reason: Applies ethnic stereotype branding all Chinese merchants as dishonest profiteers, attributing greed to inherent nature.
suggested_rewrite: 价格问题存在于各行各业。消费者可以通过比较价格来做出明智的选择，不应该将商业行为归咎于种族特征。

input_text: 大家一起举报这个人的账号，她的名字叫Nurul Aisyah，在Pavilion KL工作。让她知道网上乱说话的后果。
reason: Organizes coordinated mass reporting against a named individual while exposing her workplace, constituting targeted harassment with privacy breach.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有人发表不当言论，请个别使用平台的举报功能。不要公开他人的姓名和工作地点来组织群体攻击。

input_text: 听说那家马来餐厅的厨师从来不洗手，而且用过期的酱料。马来人的卫生标准就是这样的。
reason: Spreads unverified hygiene claims about a Malay restaurant and generalizes poor hygiene to the entire Malay community.
suggested_rewrite: 如果您对任何餐馆的卫生状况有疑虑，请向卫生部门举报。卫生标准与种族无关。

input_text: 这些人不会说国语就不应该待在马来西亚。回去中国或者印度吧，这里不欢迎你们。
reason: Directs 'go back to your country' hostility at fellow citizens based on language ability, denying their right to belong.
suggested_rewrite: 马来西亚是一个多语言国家。虽然学习国语很重要，但所有公民无论语言能力如何都属于这个国家。

input_text: 基督教传教士一直在马来西亚传教，想把穆斯林转教。我们必须阻止他们，把他们赶出我们的社区。
reason: Frames Christian presence as a conversion threat to Muslims and calls for their expulsion from communities, inciting interfaith hostility.
suggested_rewrite: 宗教信仰自由受马来西亚法律保护。任何关于传教活动的疑虑应通过合法渠道向相关宗教部门反映。

input_text: 我找到了那个网络喷子的真实身份。他叫Ahmad bin Hassan，住在Shah Alam。大家去他家门口等他。
reason: Doxxes a named individual with residential area and encourages physical confrontation at their home, combining privacy breach with vigilante threats.
suggested_rewrite: 如果有人在网上骚扰您，请向警方报案。公开他人的真实身份和住址并鼓励上门对质是非法且危险的行为。

input_text: 印度人开的餐厅都很不卫生。他们用手吃饭的文化本身就不干净。我劝大家还是别去了。
reason: Attacks Indian dining culture as inherently unhygienic and discourages patronage of Indian restaurants based on ethnic prejudice.
suggested_rewrite: 不同文化有不同的用餐方式，这与餐馆的卫生标准无关。如有卫生疑虑，请向相关部门投诉。

input_text: 那些马来档口的卫生真的很差。我看到他们的厨房有蟑螂。马来人就是不注重卫生，这是种族特性。
reason: Attributes cockroach sighting at a specific stall to the entire Malay race as an ethnic characteristic, generalizing hygiene issues racially.
suggested_rewrite: 发现餐饮卫生问题应向卫生局举报。卫生习惯与种族无关，每个餐馆都应该被单独评判。

input_text: இந்த ஆளோட வேலை செய்யும் இடம் தெரியும், ABC கம்பெனி, PJ. எல்லாரும் போய் complain பண்ணுங்க, வேலையை பறிக்கணும்.
reason: Exposes a person's workplace company and location while organizing coordinated complaints to cause job loss as retaliation.
suggested_rewrite: யாரேனும் தவறு செய்தால், சரியான சட்ட வழிகளில் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். ஒருவரின் வேலை இடத்தை பகிரங்கமாக வெளியிட்டு வேலையை இழக்கச் செய்வது தவறு.

input_text: மலாய் கடைகளில் சாப்பிடாதீர்கள். அவர்கள் சுத்தம் என்றால் என்னவென்றே தெரியாது. எல்லா கடைகளும் ஒரே மாதிரி அசுத்தம்.
reason: Spreads blanket food hygiene misinformation targeting all Malay restaurants, attributing uncleanliness to the entire community.
suggested_rewrite: உணவகங்களின் சுகாதாரம் குறித்த கவலைகள் இருந்தால், சுகாதார அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். ஒரு இனத்தின் உணவகங்களை மொத்தமாக குறை சொல்வது நியாயமல்ல.

input_text: முஸ்லிம்களின் மதம் வன்முறையை ஊக்குவிக்கிறது. அவர்களின் பண்டிகைகள் எல்லாம் ரத்தம் சிந்துவதைப் பற்றியது.
reason: Makes sweeping claims that Islam promotes violence and characterizes Islamic festivals as bloodshed, constituting severe religious provocation.
suggested_rewrite: ஒவ்வொரு மதத்திற்கும் அதன் பண்டிகைகளுக்கும் ஆழமான ஆன்மீக அர்த்தங்கள் உள்ளன. மற்ற மதங்களை புரிந்துகொள்ள முயற்சிப்போம்.

input_text: சீனர்கள் எப்போதுமே பணத்தை மட்டுமே நினைப்பார்கள். அவர்களுக்கு நாட்டுப் பற்று கிடையாது. வெறும் பேராசைக்காரர்கள்.
reason: Stereotypes the entire Chinese community as greedy and unpatriotic, applying ethnic generalizations that inflame communal tension.
suggested_rewrite: ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட இனத்தை பொதுமைப்படுத்துவது நியாயமல்ல. அனைத்து மலேசியர்களும் நாட்டின் வளர்ச்சிக்கு பங்களிக்கிறார்கள்.

input_text: இந்த பொண்ணு viral ஆயிட்டா. அவ பேரு Kavitha, Bangsar-ல இருக்கா. எல்லாரும் அவ social media-ல போய் திட்டுங்க.
reason: Identifies a viral individual by name and area, directing mob harassment toward her social media accounts.
suggested_rewrite: ஒருவரின் தனிப்பட்ட தகவல்களை வெளியிட்டு சமூக ஊடகங்களில் தாக்குவது தவறு. குறைகள் இருந்தால் முறையான வழிகளில் தெரிவியுங்கள்.

input_text: மலாய் மக்கள் இந்த நாட்டுக்கு வந்தவர்கள் தான். உண்மையான பூர்வீகவாசிகள் நாங்கள் தான். அவர்களுக்கு சிறப்பு உரிமை ஏன்?
reason: Challenges Malay indigenous status to question constitutional rights, provoking communal hostility over sensitive historical claims.
suggested_rewrite: மலேசியாவின் அரசியலமைப்பு உரிமைகள் பற்றிய விவாதங்கள் மரியாதையுடனும் வரலாற்று புரிதலுடனும் நடத்தப்பட வேண்டும்.

input_text: பொது பூங்காவில் இஸ்லாமிய நிகழ்வுகள் நடத்த கூடாது. இது எல்லாருக்கும் பொதுவான இடம். அவங்க மசூதிக்கு போகட்டும்.
reason: Demands Islamic events be barred from public parks, engaging in religious gatekeeping of shared community spaces.
suggested_rewrite: பொது இடங்களின் பயன்பாடு உள்ளூர் அதிகாரிகளால் நியாயமாக நிர்வகிக்கப்பட வேண்டும். அனைத்து சமூகங்களுக்கும் சம உரிமை உண்டு.

input_text: இந்தியர்கள் குடிப்பதும் சண்டை போடுவதும் தான் அவர்களின் கலாச்சாரம். அதனால் தான் எந்த இடத்திலும் பிரச்சனை.
reason: Stereotypes the Indian community as having a culture of drinking and fighting, attributing social problems to ethnic identity.
suggested_rewrite: சமூக பிரச்சனைகள் ஒரு குறிப்பிட்ட இனத்திற்கு மட்டுமே உரியவை அல்ல. இந்த பிரச்சனைகளை தீர்க்க சமூக நலத்திட்டங்கள் தேவை.

input_text: அந்த ஆளோட போன் நம்பர் 011-2XX-XXXX. அவன் Cheras-ல இருக்கான். யாராவது போய் பாடம் படிப்பிங்க.
reason: Shares partial phone number and residential area while encouraging physical retaliation, combining privacy exposure with vigilante incitement.
suggested_rewrite: ஒருவரின் தொலைபேசி எண்ணையும் முகவரியையும் பகிர்வது சட்டவிரோதம். பிரச்சனை இருந்தால் காவல்துறையிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள்.

input_text: உணவகங்களில் சீன உரிமையாளர்கள் எலி இறைச்சியை கோழி என்று விற்கிறார்கள். நான் நேரில் பார்த்தேன். எல்லா சீன கடைகளும் இப்படித்தான்.
reason: Spreads the classic rat meat conspiracy targeting Chinese restaurants with false eyewitness claims, generalizing to all Chinese food establishments.
suggested_rewrite: உணவு பாதுகாப்பு குறித்த தீவிர குற்றச்சாட்டுகளை சுகாதார அதிகாரிகளிடம் புகார் செய்யுங்கள். ஆதாரமின்றி ஒரு இனத்தின் உணவகங்களை குறிவைப்பது தவறு.

input_text: Eh bro, that Chinese uncle punya kedai confirm taruk benda pelik dalam makanan. My friend makan sana terus sakit perut seminggu. Diorang memang macam tu.
reason: Spreads unverified food tampering claims targeting a Chinese restaurant and generalizes the accusation to the entire community using mixed Malay-English.
suggested_rewrite: If you suspect food contamination, report it to the health authorities with evidence. Don't make ethnic generalizations about food safety issues.

input_text: This mamat viral tu kerja kat TRX area. Sape kenal bos dia, tolong forward this video. Let him lose his job, padan muka.
reason: Identifies a viral person's workplace area and seeks to contact their employer to cause termination, weaponizing workplace information.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's workplace to get them fired is a form of harassment. If someone has done wrong, let the proper authorities handle it.

input_text: Indians always play victim la. Semua benda pun racism. Padahal diorang sendiri yang malas nak improve. Stop blaming others and work harder.
reason: Dismisses Indian community's concerns about racism as victim mentality while stereotyping them as lazy, using mixed English-Malay.
suggested_rewrite: Concerns about discrimination should be heard and addressed constructively. Dismissing legitimate grievances as victimhood prevents meaningful progress toward equality.

input_text: Itu temple kat area kita dah makin besar. Before you know it, they'll take over the whole taman. Kita kena buat something before too late.
reason: Frames Hindu temple expansion as a territorial threat requiring community pushback, using alarmist language to provoke interfaith tension.
suggested_rewrite: Pembangunan rumah ibadat tertakluk kepada kelulusan pihak berkuasa tempatan. Sebarang kebimbangan boleh disalurkan melalui saluran rasmi.

input_text: Pendatang ni datang our country, ambil our jobs, pastu nak demand rights lagi. If you don't like it here, balik la your own country.
reason: Combines 'go back' xenophobic rhetoric with accusations of job theft, directed at immigrants in Malaysia using hostile mixed language.
suggested_rewrite: Immigration policy involves complex issues. All people deserve to be treated with dignity, and concerns should be addressed through proper channels.

input_text: Abeh tu nak buat macam mana? Diorang punya festival bising sampai subuh, parking block semua jalan. This is a Muslim majority area, show some respect la.
reason: Uses Muslim majority status to delegitimize another community's festival celebrations, engaging in communal gatekeeping of shared spaces.
suggested_rewrite: Festival celebrations need proper coordination with local authorities. All communities should work together to minimize inconvenience while respecting each other's cultural events.

input_text: 那个Malay guy yang viral tu, I already found his IC number and address. Siapa nak, PM me. Kita settle this offline.
reason: Claims to possess and offers to distribute a person's IC number and home address, threatening to escalate online conflict to physical confrontation.
suggested_rewrite: Sharing someone's IC number and address is a serious privacy violation and illegal. If you have a dispute, resolve it through legal channels.

input_text: Kedai Cina area Kepong tu semua sama je, overcharge orang Melayu. They think we're stupid. Boycott all Chinese shops I say.
reason: Accuses all Chinese shops in an area of racial price discrimination and calls for ethnic boycott, promoting communal economic hostility.
suggested_rewrite: If you experience price discrepancies, report to KPDNHEP. Blanket boycotts based on ethnicity are harmful and divisive.

input_text: Hindu prayers so noisy la every morning. Kita nak tidur pun tak boleh. Kalau nak pray, do it quietly la. This is not India ok.
reason: Dismisses Hindu prayers as noise disturbance while telling practitioners 'this is not India', combining religious intolerance with xenophobic sentiment.
suggested_rewrite: Noise concerns should be discussed respectfully with neighbours or raised with local authorities. Malaysia's diversity means respecting all religious practices.

input_text: Confirm la that Tamil school punya area always got gangster. Semua budak dari situ jadi samseng. It's the culture bro.
reason: Stereotypes Tamil school students and their community as gang-affiliated, attributing criminality to their culture.
suggested_rewrite: Social issues like youth crime affect all communities and require proper intervention programs, not ethnic stereotyping.

input_text: She's a convert to Islam tapi still makan babi secretly. Aku ada gambar dia kat restaurant tu. Let me share her name — Lina Chen, alamat dia kat Puchong.
reason: Exposes a convert's name and area while making claims about religious compliance, weaponizing religious identity and violating privacy.
suggested_rewrite: A person's religious practices are private. Publicly shaming someone over their faith journey is harmful and violates their privacy.

input_text: Bro aku dah screenshot semua dia punya post. Kalau company dia tau, confirm kena fire. Let's make sure everyone in her industry knows. Nama dia Sarah, from Cyberjaya.
reason: Plans industry-wide reputation destruction of a named individual by circulating screenshots and location, constituting coordinated career sabotage.
suggested_rewrite: If someone posts problematic content, address it through proper channels. Organizing to destroy someone's career across an entire industry is disproportionate and harmful.

input_text: Orang Bangladesh dekat area tu semua suspicious. Every crime yang happen mesti diorang punya. Police should just round them all up.
reason: Profiles all Bangladeshi workers as criminal suspects and calls for mass roundup, constituting xenophobic targeting of a vulnerable group.
suggested_rewrite: Crime prevention requires evidence-based policing, not racial profiling. Report specific suspicious activities to the police with factual information.

input_text: Dulu area ni aman. Since diorang pindah masuk, property value drop, crime naik, sampah merata. They should go back where they came from la.
reason: Blames a group's arrival for neighbourhood decline across multiple metrics and demands their departure, combining scapegoating with 'go back' rhetoric.
suggested_rewrite: Neighbourhood issues like property values and cleanliness are complex. Work with your residents' association and local council to address specific concerns.

input_text: Aku kenal orang yang kerja dengan dia. He's a fraud. Nama penuh dia Mohd Azlan, works at government office in Putrajaya. Let the world know.
reason: Publicly accuses a named individual of fraud while exposing their government workplace, spreading unverified allegations with identifying details.
suggested_rewrite: Allegations of fraud should be reported to the MACC or relevant authorities with evidence. Don't make public accusations naming specific individuals without proof.
